title: phyllanthus zollingeri
intro: Phyllanthus zollingeri, also known as the Zollinger's amaryllis or Zollinger's phyllanthus, is a species of flowering plant in the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Southeast Asian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Phyllanthus zollingeri include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve liver function, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are believed to possess antiviral and antibacterial properties.
